news.title: 奥斯卡红毯：星光与时尚图集
news.title0: Oscars red carpet: Stars and fashion in pictures
news.content: 好莱坞巨星齐聚奥斯卡红毯，展示年度最受瞩目的时尚造型，角逐“最佳着装”非官方奖项。
news.content0: If the Oscars gave out an award for best dressed, it would be the most hotly contested prize of the night.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 威廉王子分享戴安娜王妃未公开照片庆母亲节
news.title0: William shares unseen photo of Princess Diana for Mother's Day
news.content: 威廉王子在母亲节分享了一张与已故母亲戴安娜王妃的未公开合照，以表怀念。
news.content0: Prince William has paid tribute to his late mother, Princess Diana, by sharing a photograph of the two together to mark Mother's Day.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 泽连斯基指责欧盟盟友在石油管道问题上“敲诈”
news.title0: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
news.content: 乌克兰总统泽连斯基指责欧盟盟友试图“敲诈”基辅，迫使其重开一条向匈牙利和斯洛伐克输送俄罗斯石油的管道。
news.content0: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has accused European allies of seeking to "blackmail" Kyiv into reopening a pipeline transporting Russian oil to Hungary and Slovakia.
news.author: BBC

news.title: FCC主席威胁吊销广播公司执照
news.title0: FCC chair threatens to revoke broadcasters' licences over Iran coverage
news.content: 美国联邦通信委员会主席威胁吊销广播公司执照，此前特朗普总统批评了媒体对伊朗战争的报道。
news.content0: The chair of the US Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has threatened to revoke broadcasters' licences after US President Donald Trump criticised their coverage of the US-Israel war with Iran.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 斯塔默与特朗普通话讨论重开霍尔木兹海峡
news.title0: Starmer speaks to Trump about importance of reopening Strait of Hormuz
news.content: 英国首相斯塔默与美国总统特朗普通话，讨论重开霍尔木兹海峡以结束全球航运中断的重要性。
news.content0: The prime minister has spoken to Donald Trump about the importance of reopening the Strait of Hormuz "to end the disruption to global shipping", Downing Street has said.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 警方调查伦敦抗议活动中“消灭以色列国防军”口号
news.title0: Police investigate 'death to the IDF' chants led by Bobby Vylan at rally
news.content: 伦敦警方正调查一场抗议活动中，由朋克歌手博比·维兰带领人群高呼“消灭以色列国防军”口号的事件。
news.content0: The Metropolitan Police says it is investigating chants of "death to the IDF [Israel Defense Forces]" led by Bobby Vylan, of the punk duo Bob Vylan, at an Al Quds Day protest in central London.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 密歇根犹太教堂袭击者兄弟系真主党指挥官
news.title0: Michigan synagogue attacker's brother was Hezbollah commander, IDF says
news.content: 以色列国防军称，密歇根犹太教堂袭击者的兄弟是一名真主党指挥官，已于上周空袭中丧生。
news.content0: A brother of the man accused of attacking a Michigan synagogue on Thursday had been a Hezbollah commander who was killed in an air strike last week, the Israel Defense Forces (IDF) says.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英国肯特大学爆发脑膜炎疫情致两人死亡
news.title0: Two die including uni student in meningitis outbreak
news.content: 英国肯特大学及周边地区爆发“侵袭性”脑膜炎疫情，已造成两人死亡，另有11人住院。
news.content0: Two people have died following an outbreak of "invasive" meningitis, including one student at the University of Kent.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 伊朗人如何突破网络封锁与海外家人联系
news.title0: How Iranians are evading internet blocks to contact family abroad
news.content: 战争期间，伊朗人通过边境电话桥接、高价VPN等方式，艰难突破当局的网络封锁与海外亲人保持联系。
news.content0: On the Iran-Turkey border a man sells a service that helpsIranians outside their country keep in touch with loved ones inside.
news.author: BBC
